'''âf-m-ch''' ('''kafamach''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:pummel|pummel]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| f-m-ch
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:pummel|pummel]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âf-m-ch
|-
! Lemma
| kafamach
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thifamach|thifamach]] || [[word:jifamach|jifamach]] || [[word:shifamach|shifamach]] || [[word:kifamach|kifamach]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthufamach|thuthufamach]] || [[word:jujufamach|jujufamach]] || [[word:shushufamach|shushufamach]] || [[word:kukufamach|kukufamach]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thufamach|thufamach]] || [[word:jufamach|jufamach]] || [[word:shufamach|shufamach]] || [[word:kufamach|kufamach]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thufamach|thufamach]] || [[word:jufamach|jufamach]] || [[word:shufamach|shufamach]] || [[word:kufamach|kufamach]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thefamach|thefamach]] || [[word:jefamach|jefamach]] || [[word:shefamach|shefamach]] || [[word:kefamach|kefamach]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothofamach|thothofamach]] || [[word:jojofamach|jojofamach]] || [[word:shoshofamach|shoshofamach]] || [[word:kokofamach|kokofamach]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thofamach|thofamach]] || [[word:jofamach|jofamach]] || [[word:shofamach|shofamach]] || [[word:kofamach|kofamach]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thofamach|thofamach]] || [[word:jofamach|jofamach]] || [[word:shofamach|shofamach]] || [[word:kofamach|kofamach]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠfamach|thĂŠfamach]] || [[word:jĂŠfamach|jĂŠfamach]] || [[word:shĂŠfamach|shĂŠfamach]] || [[word:kĂŠfamach|kĂŠfamach]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathafamach|thathafamach]] || [[word:jajafamach|jajafamach]] || [[word:shashafamach|shashafamach]] || [[word:kakafamach|kakafamach]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thafamach|thafamach]] || [[word:jafamach|jafamach]] || [[word:shafamach|shafamach]] || [[word:kafamach|kafamach]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thafamach|thafamach]] || [[word:jafamach|jafamach]] || [[word:shafamach|shafamach]] || [[word:kafamach|kafamach]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shafamach|shafamach]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshafamach|goshafamach]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishafamach|gokishafamach]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shafamachnĂŒ|shafamachnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshafamachnknĂŒ|goshafamachnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishafamachnĂŒ|gokishafamachnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shafamachshĂ«|shafamachshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshafamachnkshĂ«|goshafamachnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishafamachshĂ«|gokishafamachshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shafamachro|shafamachro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshafamachnkro|goshafamachnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishafamachro|gokishafamachro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shafamachmu|shafamachmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshafamachnkmu|goshafamachnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishafamachmu|gokishafamachmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shafamachsher|shafamachsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshafamachnksher|goshafamachnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishafamachsher|gokishafamachsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shafamachng|shafamachng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshafamachnkng|goshafamachnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishafamachng|gokishafamachng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shafamachya|shafamachya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshafamachnkya|goshafamachnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishafamachya|gokishafamachya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shafamachyam|shafamachyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshafamachnkyam|goshafamachnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishafamachyam|gokishafamachyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shafamachnĂŒshĂ«|shafamachnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshafamachnknĂŒshĂ«|goshafamachnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishafamachnĂŒshĂ«|gokishafamachnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shafamachnĂŒro|shafamachnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshafamachnknĂŒro|goshafamachnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishafamachnĂŒro|gokishafamachnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shafamachnĂŒmu|shafamachnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshafamachnknĂŒmu|goshafamachnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishafamachnĂŒmu|gokishafamachnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shafamachshĂ«nĂŒ|shafamachshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshafamachnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshafamachnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishafamachshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishafamachshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shafamachshĂ«ro|shafamachshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshafamachnkshĂ«ro|goshafamachnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishafamachshĂ«ro|gokishafamachshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shafamachshĂ«mu|shafamachshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshafamachnkshĂ«mu|goshafamachnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishafamachshĂ«mu|gokishafamachshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shafamachronĂŒ|shafamachronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshafamachnkronĂŒ|goshafamachnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishafamachronĂŒ|gokishafamachronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shafamachroshĂ«|shafamachroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshafamachnkroshĂ«|goshafamachnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishafamachroshĂ«|gokishafamachroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shafamachromu|shafamachromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshafamachnkromu|goshafamachnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishafamachromu|gokishafamachromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shafamachmunĂŒ|shafamachmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshafamachnkmunĂŒ|goshafamachnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishafamachmunĂŒ|gokishafamachmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shafamachmushĂ«|shafamachmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshafamachnkmushĂ«|goshafamachnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishafamachmushĂ«|gokishafamachmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shafamachmuro|shafamachmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshafamachnkmuro|goshafamachnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishafamachmuro|gokishafamachmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]
